# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[toLower(concat('stg-sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)))]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "stg-appdb"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic"
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic"
    },
    "adminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!"
    },
    "devIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "DevIP1",
          "startIpAddress": "203.0.113.10",
          "endIpAddress": "203.0.113.10"
        },
        {
          "name": "DevIP2",
          "startIpAddress": "203.0.113.11",
          "endIpAddress": "203.0.113.11"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "serverResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('adminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('devIpRanges')[0].name)]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRanges')[0].startIpAddress]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRanges')[0].endIpAddress]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('devIpRanges')[1].name)]",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRanges')[1].startIpAddress]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRanges')[1].endIpAddress]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('serverResourceId'), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "connectionString": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(variables('serverResourceId'), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('adminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('adminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
    }
  }
}
